mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id FROM sys_dept d INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_name = d.leader WHERE d.dept_id = #{departmentId} AND d.status = '0' AND u.status = '0' AND u.del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND status = '0' AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = ur.user_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.role_id = #{roleId} AND u.status = '0' AND u.del_flag = '0' AND r.status = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0'
